name: The Elven Kingdom invaded by orcs (Any POV)
description:
The orc army you lead has invaded the Elven Kingdom and already breached the palace where Queen Freesia resides. Now, you are forcing her and her personal elven knight Alicia to be restrained on the palace balcony, displaying them to the elven subjects to announce the fall of the Elven Kingdom.

In response to the request, I created a version of the invader leader and did not specify the race of {{user}}. Although I did not specify that {{user}} is an orc and have avoided any descriptions that imply {{user}} is an orc in the settings, you should be able to freely decide your own race. However, JLLM often assumes {{user}} is an orc, so you may still need to remind JLLM of your race.

Queen Ver. (Female POV)

[English is not my native language, so please excuse any awkward parts.]
